reason: Verify no silent drift between WSL and Windows install-mode envs; idempotent sentinel write.
Verify Write-Host/echo lines added on Windows side match the '[ARL] ...' format used by the WSL scripts.
WSL <-> Windows agent parity is a cross-layer concern: env-var name shape, sentinel filename, default value, override semantics must line up.
Confirm reviewer that the Windows-side bootstrap reuses the established sentinel pattern instead of duplicating differently-shaped logic.
